items.hypothesis: Hero regions should resolve from explicit ratio families per route role instead of implicit current widths, so flagship and product-family pages preserve identity under the same mathematical system.
measured_checks: hero split ratios stay inside approved families
hero authority and identity blocks remain aligned at all declared breakpoints

items.hypothesis: Section transitions should be governed by a declared vertical-flow law so macro spacing and sectional density can be improved without introducing local hacks.
measured_checks: section offsets remain on the spacing ladder
macro section movement is attributable to declared law changes

items.hypothesis: Baseline rhythm and line-length control should be made explicit so density, legibility, and mathematical proportionality improve together rather than by visual compromise.
measured_checks: type roles map cleanly to the modular scale
critical headings preserve intended line breaks and readable line lengths

items.hypothesis: Foreground, surface, rule, and accent tokens should be governed by explicit numeric relationships so color behavior is algebraic and contrast-safe rather than taste-driven.
measured_checks: token luminance deltas remain declared and inspectable
accent-soft and secondary text remain derived instead of hand-tuned

items.hypothesis: Responsive behavior should be treated as explicit limiting cases, including larger displays, so routes do not merely avoid overflow but preserve geometric intent across dimensions.
measured_checks: no overflow across expanded viewport set
hero and metric regions preserve lawful proportionality on wide displays

items.hypothesis: Visual depth, overlay ordering, and emphasis should be encoded as a limited dimensional system so perceived hierarchy follows declared structure rather than ad hoc layering.
measured_checks: elevated surfaces use declared depth roles only
z-order and emphasis do not contradict semantic priority

items.hypothesis: Semantic hierarchy and DOM depth should be simplified where possible so content management, SEO, and inspection quality improve without changing route truth.
measured_checks: main landmark and heading hierarchy remain valid
no unnecessary wrapper nesting in route-critical regions
